response.overview: MIX TAPE tells of a group of guys obsessed with making mix tapes for their girlfriends. As the story unfolds, the tape takes on many forms, from romantic to psychotic, and even though the girls may know what's up, sometimes a really great tape is hard to resist. A bittersweet comedy about love, music, and no love, and music, MIX TAPE wears its analog heart on its sleeve-a valentine to a vanishing art form.
response.tagline: A comedy about love, and music, and no love, and music...
response.title: Mix Tape: A Film
